examples: Here's why: In 1830 a local official named George Rankin lowered himself into the cave on a rope tied to a protrusion in the cave wall.
He grabbed at a protrusion of rock with his right hand.
The protrusion turned out to be a bone.
After this journey down the spiritual past, walk toward a protrusion of the more recent history.
Talley needed to modify existing painkillers so that they attached only to enzymes with the protrusion.
